_: Cross-language fixture for the broker response request_id prefix format.
_description: The broker prepends an 8-byte big-endian unsigned 64-bit integer (the on-chain request ID)
to every response payload it sends back to the requester. The client uses this prefix to
correlate a response transaction with the request it submitted, without having to attempt
decryption on every transaction it receives.
This file is the single source of truth. Both the Rust broker (blockhost-broker-rs) and
the Python broker-client read the same cases below and verify their encode/decode logic
